data.title: United Security Bancshares Advances Merger Amid Shareholder Challenges
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from United Security Bancshares ( (UBFO) ).

Community West Bancshares and United Security Bancshares, which signed a merger agreement on December 16, 2025, have advanced their planned combination with the U.S. securities regulator declaring their registration statement effective on February 24, 2026 and both banks scheduling March 30, 2026 shareholder meetings after mailing a joint proxy statement and prospectus at the end of February. Following the merger announcement, two shareholder lawsuits were filed in New York in early March 2026 and additional demand letters alleged disclosure deficiencies in the deal materials, prompting the companies—while denying any wrongdoing—to issue extensive supplemental financial and transactional disclosures to moot the claims, reduce legal distraction and keep the transaction timeline on track, while affirming their view that existing disclosures already met legal requirements.

The most recent analyst rating on (UBFO) stock is a Buy with a $11.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on United Security Bancshares stock, see the UBFO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UBFO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UBFO is a Outperform.

United Security Bancshares is in a stable financial position with strong technical momentum and positive corporate developments. The merger with Community West Bancshares is a significant positive factor, expected to enhance growth prospects. However, challenges in revenue growth and profitability margins slightly temper the overall outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on UBFO stock, click here.

More about United Security Bancshares

United Security Bancshares is a California-based bank holding company whose primary business is conducted through its wholly owned subsidiary, United Security Bank. The company operates in community banking, focusing on loans, deposits and related financial services in its regional markets, and is now poised to combine with Community West Bancshares to create a larger West Coast community banking platform.

Average Trading Volume: 26,777

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $179.2M

For a thorough assessment of UBFO stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Natural Alternatives Reassigns CEO Role to Lead Swiss Operations
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Natural Alternatives International ( (NAII) ) has provided an update.

Natural Alternatives International, Inc. amended Chief Executive Officer Mark A. LeDoux’s employment agreement effective May 1, 2026, cutting his base salary from $475,000 to $255,000 and reducing certain officer benefits. At the same time, LeDoux entered into a separate employment agreement to serve as Managing Director of the company’s Swiss subsidiary, Natural Alternatives International, Inc. Europe, with a base salary of 170,000 CHF per year.

The company structured the U.S. and Swiss agreements so that LeDoux’s total compensation remains roughly unchanged, subject to currency fluctuations, while requiring him to spend at least half his time in Switzerland. By having its CEO concurrently lead the Swiss unit and remain board chair of both entities, Natural Alternatives aims to expand worldwide revenue and enhance its Swiss operations to give customers more opportunities to grow inside and outside the U.S.

The most recent analyst rating on (NAII) stock is a Sell with a $2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Natural Alternatives International stock, see the NAII Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NAII Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NAII is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak profitability (operating and net losses with low gross margin) and increased leverage, despite a strong TTM revenue rebound. Technical signals also remain soft (negative MACD, sub-50 RSI, and price below short-term moving averages). Positive operating and free cash flow provide some support, but losses and volatility keep the overall profile pressured.

To see Spark’s full report on NAII stock, click here.

More about Natural Alternatives International

Natural Alternatives International, Inc. operates in the nutritional supplements and wellness sector, manufacturing and supplying dietary supplement products and related formulations. The company serves global customers through its operations in the U.S. and its wholly owned Swiss subsidiary, Natural Alternatives International, Inc. Europe, reflecting a strategic focus on international markets and expanded production capabilities.

data.title: Oncolytics Biotech Shifts Corporate Domicile to British Columbia
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Oncolytics Biotech ( (ONCY) ) has issued an announcement.

Oncolytics Biotech has completed a corporate continuance that shifts the governing framework for its common shares from Alberta corporate law to the British Columbia Business Corporations Act. As part of this process, the company adopted new Notice of Articles and Articles for Oncolytics British Columbia, which became effective upon issuance of the Certificate of Continuation and now define shareholder rights under the new jurisdiction.

The move introduces certain differences in shareholder rights compared with the prior Alberta structure, as outlined in the company’s previously filed management information circular/prospectus. The filing also highlights that the company’s expectations about subsequent corporate steps, including a planned domestication and Nasdaq trading as a Nevada corporation, remain subject to regulatory risks and other uncertainties disclosed in its SEC filings.

The most recent analyst rating on (ONCY) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oncolytics Biotech stock, see the ONCY Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ONCY is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, sizable losses, heavy cash burn, and a sharply reduced equity base that raises financing risk). Technicals are a near-term positive with price above major moving averages and positive momentum indicators, while valuation remains difficult to support due to the negative P/E and lack of dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on ONCY stock, click here.

data.title: Mag Mile Capital Delays Annual 10-K Filing
data.description:
Mag Mile Capital ( (MMCP) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Mag Mile Capital, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors of a delay in submitting its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The notification confirms that the late filing relates specifically to the annual Form 10-K (Yearly Report), not to any Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) or other periodic filings.

The company cites delays in obtaining and compiling certain information required for inclusion in the Form 10-K (Yearly Report). Management states that meeting the original deadline would have required unreasonable effort and expense, implying operational timing issues rather than structural problems like auditor changes or control failures.

Mag Mile Capital, Inc. has indicated that it expects to file the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) no later than the fifteenth calendar day after the original due date. This timing aligns with the standard extension window allowed under SEC Rule 12b-25 for annual reports.

The company does not anticipate any significant change in results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year, based on what will be reflected in the upcoming annual financial statements. As with all forward-looking statements, this expectation could be affected by final audit adjustments or unforeseen developments before the report is filed.

Management emphasizes that all other required SEC reports over the past 12 months have been filed on time, signaling ongoing efforts to remain compliant with reporting obligations. The notification is signed by President and Chief Executive Officer Rushi Shah on March 20, 2026, underscoring executive-level responsibility for the delayed filing and the planned completion of the Form 10-K (Yearly Report).

More about Mag Mile Capital

Average Trading Volume: 27,386

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: reAlpha Finalizes CFO Separation Agreement and Severance Terms
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from reAlpha Tech Corp. ( (AIRE) ).

On February 25, 2026, reAlpha Tech Corp. terminated the employment of Chief Financial Officer Piyush Phadke, and on March 16, 2026, the two parties executed a separation agreement that formalized his exit. The agreement grants Phadke severance equal to two months of base salary, paid over a two‑month period starting March 31, 2026, and accelerates the vesting of 82,539 restricted stock units into an equivalent number of common shares, while all other unvested equity awards were forfeited and cancelled, clarifying the company’s financial and governance obligations related to his departure.

This separation package, which includes a broad release of claims and standard confidentiality and non‑disparagement provisions, closes out Phadke’s compensation arrangements and removes future vesting liabilities from reAlpha’s balance sheet. The resolution provides stakeholders with greater transparency around the cost and structure of the CFO transition, while signaling the company’s intent to manage executive departures through defined cash severance and equity acceleration terms that balance contractual commitments with the need to limit ongoing obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (AIRE) stock is a Buy with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on reAlpha Tech Corp. stock, see the AIRE Stock Forecast page.

Super League Enterprise ( (SLE) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 16, 2026, Super League Enterprise, Inc. agreed to acquire the Misfits Ads Business from Esports Now, LLC, paying $1.5 million in cash at closing plus equity, pre-funded warrants and a warrant package, along with a $300,000 delayed cash payment and potential earnout consideration tied to gross profit and market capitalization milestones. Closing is subject to shareholder approval, regulatory clearances and key contract consents, and Misfits will gain board representation at Super League through an independent designee.

The deal is positioned as a strategic expansion of Super League’s advertising platform, adding programmatic revenue streams, rewarded video technology, creator relationships and new data and brand partnerships to support its path toward positive adjusted EBITDA after a prior restructuring and PIPE financing. Super League and Misfits will also enter a preferred commercial partnership to run brand integrations across Misfits’ large owned game portfolio, while integration, execution, competition and transaction-related risks could influence whether the anticipated benefits and earnout payments are ultimately realized.

IRSA Inversiones y Representaciones SA, the Argentine real estate and investment group, has fixed-rate Series XXIV notes outstanding in a principal amount of USD 480.45 million, due 2035, reflecting its continued reliance on long-term dollar funding. TC Energy ( (TSE:TRP) ) has issued an announcement.

TC Energy has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission in March 2026, providing its March 5, 2026 management information circular and related materials for the upcoming annual meeting of common shareholders. The filing also confirms that its wholly owned subsidiary TransCanada PipeLines Limited continues to rely on TC Energy’s continuous disclosure documents under Canadian securities law exemptions, consolidating key reporting for investors.

The circular formally calls a virtual-only annual meeting for May 7, 2026, where shareholders of record as of March 20, 2026 will receive 2025 audited financial statements, elect directors, appoint the auditor, and cast an advisory vote on executive compensation. Management highlights the company’s 2025 performance in natural gas and power generation, outlines its strategy to build on growth in these segments in 2026, and underscores the virtual format as a cost-efficient, environmentally friendly way to ensure broad shareholder participation in governance matters.

TC Energy is also promoting electronic delivery of proxy and meeting materials to both registered and non-registered shareholders, aiming to streamline investor communications and reduce paper-based processes. These steps reinforce the company’s governance framework and transparency practices, while aligning shareholder engagement with its broader sustainability and operational efficiency objectives.

Its operations emphasize safety, operational excellence and long-term stakeholder relationships, partnering with communities and businesses to deliver affordable, reliable and sustainable energy. data.title: Dreamland Limited Calls April EGM to Approve Multi-Stage Share Consolidation
data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Dreamland Limited Class A ( (TDIC) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 20, 2026, Dreamland Limited called a 2026 extraordinary general meeting of shareholders to be held in Hong Kong on April 1, 2026, setting March 19, 2026 as the record date for voting eligibility. Shareholders are being solicited by the board to return proxy cards or attend in person to vote on material changes to the company’s share structure.

The meeting will ask shareholders to approve a one-for-five consolidation of both issued and unissued Class A and Class B ordinary shares, effectively reducing the number of authorized shares while keeping total share capital unchanged. Investors will also vote on giving the board broad discretion to implement a further share consolidation within a wide range of ratios over the following 180 days, including authority to manage fractional shares, a move that could significantly affect share liquidity, trading price dynamics and capital structure flexibility.

More about Dreamland Limited Class A

Dreamland Limited is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker TDIC and operates as a foreign private issuer. The company has a dual-class share structure with Class A and Class B ordinary shares and is headquartered in Hong Kong, with its principal offices in Cheung Sha Wan, Kowloon.

data.description:

Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited ( (MSW) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Ming Shing Group Holdings Limited, a Hong Kong-based subcontractor focused on wet trades works such as plastering, tiling and related services, conducts its business via two wholly owned subsidiaries that serve both public and private sector construction markets. Its ambition is to strengthen its position in Hong Kong’s construction industry while also targeting growth opportunities in the United States.

On March 20, 2026, the company reported unaudited results for the six months ended September 30, 2025, showing revenue halving year on year to US$8.4 million and swinging from a gross profit to a gross loss of US$2.8 million. Net results deteriorated from a US$1.0 million profit to a US$3.6 million loss, driven by cost overruns, project delays and unresolved variation order pricing, highlighting operational and margin pressures that may weigh on profitability and raise execution risks for stakeholders.

data.title: FVCBankcorp Extends Share Repurchase Program Through 2027
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

FVCBankcorp ( (FVCB) ) has issued an update.

On March 19, 2026, FVCBankcorp, Inc. said its board had extended the share repurchase program first launched in 2020, authorizing buybacks of up to 1.4 million common shares, or about 8% of stock outstanding as of Dec. 31, 2025. The program, which allows repurchases via open‑market trades, block deals or private transactions, is scheduled to run until March 31, 2027, unless the board ends it earlier.

Repurchased shares will be cancelled and returned to authorized but unissued status, potentially boosting per‑share metrics for remaining investors and signaling confidence in the company’s valuation. Management retains broad discretion over timing and volume of buybacks based on market conditions, capital needs and alternative uses of cash, and the program can be modified, suspended or terminated at any time with no obligation to repurchase any minimum amount.

The most recent analyst rating on (FVCB) stock is a Buy with a $17.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on FVCBankcorp stock, see the FVCB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FVCB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FVCB is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by the weak/uncertain 2025 cash-flow picture and profitability volatility, despite clear balance-sheet improvement and steady revenue growth. Technicals are supportive but appear overbought, while valuation is reasonable and the recent notes offering is a mixed signal (added capital flexibility but higher debt cost).

To see Spark’s full report on FVCB stock, click here.

More about FVCBankcorp

FVCBankcorp, Inc. is the holding company for FVCbank, a $2.29 billion Virginia‑chartered community bank based in Fairfax, Va., serving commercial businesses, nonprofit organizations and professional service firms in the greater Baltimore and Washington, D.C., metropolitan areas. The locally owned bank, founded in 2007, operates eight full‑service offices across Northern Virginia, Washington, D.C., Baltimore and Bethesda, Md.

The institution focuses on providing banking services to business owners and their employees, positioning itself as a regional community lender in the Mid‑Atlantic market. Its footprint and client base emphasize relationship banking for commercial and nonprofit customers rather than mass‑market retail banking.

data.title: Chilean Cobalt Refreshes Board Ahead of Potential Uplisting
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Chilean Cobalt Corp. ( (COBA) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 19, 2026, Chilean Cobalt Corp. appointed veteran capital markets executives Michael Caperonis and Tom Diffely to its board of directors, with both expected to serve on the audit committee. The pair, described as long-time supporters and significant shareholders, add deep equity and institutional finance expertise as the company positions its cobalt, copper and rare earth assets for broader investor exposure.

That same day, founding director and audit committee chair Greg Levinson resigned from the board to pursue new ventures, though he will remain a supportive shareholder. The board realignment is intended to bolster independence and governance as Chilean Cobalt evaluates a possible future uplisting to a national securities exchange, a move that could enhance access to capital and strengthen its standing in the critical minerals sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (COBA) stock is a Buy with a $1.28 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chilean Cobalt Corp. stock, see the COBA Stock Forecast page.

More about Chilean Cobalt Corp.

Chilean Cobalt Corp. is a U.S.-based critical minerals exploration and development company focused on the La Cobaltera cobalt-copper project in northern Chile, one of the world’s few primary cobalt districts. The company is also advancing the El Cofre cobalt-copper and NeoRe rare earth projects, aiming to create ecological, social, economic and financial value for stakeholders in Chile and its shareholders.

Operating on the OTCQB under ticker COBA, Chilean Cobalt targets the growing market for energy transition and critical minerals through early-stage project development. Its strategy centers on expanding access to capital markets to fund project advancement while strengthening corporate governance and board independence ahead of a potential future uplisting to a national securities exchange.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest update is out from Ramaco Resources ( (METC) ).

On March 16, 2026, Ramaco Resources, Inc. and its subsidiary Ramaco Carbon, LLC filed a civil complaint in the U.S. District Court for the District of Wyoming against former employee Alex J. Moyes. The company alleges misappropriation of trade secrets under both federal and Wyoming law, as well as breaches of a non-disclosure agreement and an employment offer letter.

Ramaco is seeking preliminary and permanent injunctive relief alongside compensatory and exemplary or punitive damages, plus legal fees and costs. The litigation underscores the company’s effort to safeguard its confidential information and trade secrets, signaling a firm stance on intellectual property protection that may affect its internal controls and relations with current and former staff.

The most recent analyst rating on (METC) stock is a Hold with a $14.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ramaco Resources stock, see the METC Stock Forecast page.
